---
title: Policies
---

This page is under construction.

## Booking

Scheduling
Billing


## Level 2-4

Level 2
Safety training
Safety test
Annual renewal
Annual screener
SOP Safety

Level 3
Level 2 reqs
First Aid
CPR/AED
Train: un/load participant
SOP Data

Level 4
Level 2, 3 reqs
Shadow hours
Test: run scanner, trouble shoot reconstruct, data export, emergency response

## Computers

Organize Stimulus Control
Organize DICOM Computer

## Trainings

Regular Safety, SOP, Medical trainings
